descriptions.text: Welcome to the Celto Region, the setting of Pokémon Lime Version, which is inspired by Ireland! The goal of our rom hack is to capture and emulate a familiar, yet new Gen 3 experience. You will journey throughout Celto, completing the gym challenge, meeting various characters, and venturing through all four seasons along the way. Some will aid you on your journey, while others may stand in your way to the top!
